details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements. ImageTextToTextPipeline class correctly added with async _call method handling both image and text inputs. Proper imports, processor usage for pixel_values, tokenizer integration, and model.generate() call all implemented correctly. Comprehensive JSDoc documentation with @typedef blocks and example usage included. Properly registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with 'multimodal' type and default model. Follows existing pipeline patterns (batching support, proper helper function usage) with no modifications to existing classes. Minor: PLAN.md created but empty (planning artifact, not affecting implementation score).
